title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: Cursor highlights PayPal's use of AI-assisted development to achieve 40% additional capabilities delivery in 2026 and complete a Java upgrade 6x faster. The piece positions AI tooling as expanding engineering capability beyond efficiency gains.
